details.test: Task 1 - Buy 2 GA tickets with FEST10 and cheapest delivery
Task 2 - Register for Vegan Dessert competition (Sunday after 2 PM, fee <= 40)
Task 3 - Create Sunday tasting list with vegetarian-friendly vendors (time window 12-17)
Task 4 - Book Friday baking and grilling workshops without conflicts
Task 5 - Purchase cheapest token bundle (>=15 tokens, per-token < 3) with pickup option
Task 6 - Create family plan with kid-friendly activities ending by 6 PM
Task 7 - Submit two vendor reviews with ratings 5 and 4
Task 8 - Compare chili competitions and register for best prize (fee <= 50)
Task 9 - Build Quick Bites list with fast, gluten-free options under $15
